name: Banana Chocolate Chantilly Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 Pkg French Vanilla Pudding Mix (3 1/4 Oz)
1 8-Inch Chocolate Or Graham Cracker Crumb Crust
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine cream cheese, milk, and pudding mix. Beat with an electric mixer on low speed for 2 minutes.
2. Turn half of the pudding mixture into the crust. Top with banana slices, then drizzle with 1/4 cup fudge sauce. Cover with remaining pudding mixture and drizzle the remaining 1/4 cup fudge sauce over top. With a knife, swirl the fudge sauce into the pudding slightly. Sprinkle almonds over the pie.
3. Refrigerate for 1 hour or longer until set. Cut into slices to serve.
